title: Be able to Hyperlink to a website in the automatic email automation
excerpt: I would like to send out an email to my client’s after a job is completed requesting a review of the service (of which I’ve built on a Monday Form), but the only way to present the link is via a fully typed out web-link …

posts.author: JPalmisano (Jordan Palmisano)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to send out an email to my client’s after a job is completed requesting a review of the service (of which I’ve built on a Monday Form), but the only way to present the link is via a fully typed out web-link (https://community.monday.com/) I would like to be able to link to my page with an abbreviated and more professional link such as “Monday Community”. Please add additional formatting options such as hyperlink button to email automation to allow for this functionality.

posts.author: SRobinson (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: Any solution on this yet? The ability to drop a .jpeg “feedback button” and embed the link in that would be nice

posts.author: TimD (Tim Dierckxsens)
posts.cookedHtml: A major isue to be solved if you want Sales CRM to be taken seriously.
